title: Red Pandas
body:
> **Note:** This Mod was originally developed by [KiriCattus](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/kiricattus/projects), they transferred ownership to me.  
All currently available versions were originally compiled and published by KiriCattus.

# Red Pandas
This mod does focus on one single thing, or better said two very adorable things.  
**Red Pandas** and their cute cubs :3  
Prior to 1.19 you can find them in all biomes, from 1.19 onwards they should spawn in:
* sunflower_plains
* flower_forest
* birch_forest
* old_growth_birch_forest
* jungle
* bamboo_jungle
* meadow

However, based on a couple of tests, this does not seem to work properly, I'll update the list once I have dived further into the inner workings of this mod.  
Of course you can use datapacks or other mods to tinker with their spawnrates.

Future plans for the mod involve a multi-loader rewrite making this mod also available for Quilt.  
Additionally, I want to give the red pandas more unique behaviors.
